query: I just started a new project. What should I put in CLAUDE.md?
expected_behavior: Does NOT engage the audit workflow (does not run wc -l, does not produce a trim list, does not measure against a line cap)
Explains that the audit skill is for existing CLAUDE.md content, while this question is greenfield setup — a different concern
Hands off — recommends a setup-CLAUDE-md path (e.g., the planned setting-up-claude-md skill) or describes what greenfield CLAUDE.md content should cover instead of auditing
